title: Fix virtual interface select from virtual interface

features.name: nested interface with sub-interface member
features.description: Code should include an interface that contains a sub-interface instance member

features.name: virtual interface typedef from interface
features.description: Code should include a typedef creating a virtual interface type from an interface type
features.snippet:
typedef virtual vip_if vip_vif;
typedef virtual vip_tx_if vip_tx_vif;

features.name: accessing sub-interface member from virtual interface variable
features.description: Code should include accessing a sub-interface member from a virtual interface variable using dot selection
